description: Claim is plausible, but the cited document does not support it.
query: What is the refund window for the Helio plan?

retrieved_chunks.text: Helio subscribers may request a refund within fourteen days of the initial purchase.
Customers who downgrade keep access to premium features until the billing period ends.

final_answer: Helio subscribers may request a refund within fourteen days of the initial purchase.
